acceptanceCriteria.criterion: An expired agent:running claim cannot disappear from the scheduler
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Eligible running claims preserve the canonical runId and remain dispatchable.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A restart with no local workspace reconstructs from GitHub state
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: start_execution resolves the confirmed run and attempt before Workspace.create_for_issue; workspaces remain reconstructible runtime state.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A valid existing run resumes without creating another AgentRun or PR
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Existing run and attempt dispositions preserve run_80_existing in regression coverage and emit recovery.resumed.
Recovery uses stable operation and batch IDs derived from the existing attempt.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Recovery decisions are audit-confirmed before irreversible actions
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: append_recovery_event must return a confirmed receipt before start_execution succeeds and before workspace creation/Codex launch.
make all passed at exact commit 1de53620dc77f2755741b62b39b1d225bc37c961.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- make all
checks.summary: 275 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100% coverage; Credo clean; Dialyzer 0 errors; format/spec/build passed.

residualRisk.summary: End-to-end restart proof will be repeated after game-api#90 pagination is deployed so the latest expired claim is always selected from long issue histories.

summary: Exact-run restart recovery is fail-closed and audit-confirmed before workspace recreation; the complete Symphony gate passed.
